# Logister

Logister is a free, open source error tracking and operational telemetry app for self-hosted teams.

It supports:
- Ruby and Rails apps via the `logister-ruby` gem
- JavaScript and TypeScript apps via the `logister-js` package
- CFML apps running on Lucee or Adobe ColdFusion via direct HTTP ingestion

Canonical documentation lives on the public docs host:
- Product docs: https://docs.logister.org/
- Docs sitemap: https://docs.logister.org/sitemap.xml

## Public pages
- Home: /
- About: /about
- Privacy Policy: /privacy
- Terms of Use: /terms

## Public docs
- Docs home: https://docs.logister.org/
- Getting started: https://docs.logister.org/getting-started/
- Self-hosting: https://docs.logister.org/self-hosting/
- Local development: https://docs.logister.org/local-development/
- Deployment: https://docs.logister.org/deployment/
- ClickHouse: https://docs.logister.org/clickhouse/
- HTTP API: https://docs.logister.org/http-api/
- Ruby integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/ruby/
- JavaScript integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/javascript/
- CFML integration: https://docs.logister.org/integrations/cfml/

## Product summary
- Captures and groups application errors.
- Stores stacktrace, request context, occurrence history, and status.
- Accepts `error`, `log`, `metric`, `transaction`, and `check_in` events.
- Includes a public docs site with setup, deployment, API, and integration guides.

## Primary audience
- Ruby and Rails developers who want self-hosted error tracking.
- JavaScript and TypeScript developers integrating Node or Express apps.
- ColdFusion, Lucee, and CFML developers sending structured events to Logister.

## Companion packages
- RubyGems: https://rubygems.org/gems/logister-ruby
- Ruby source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister-ruby
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/logister-js
- JavaScript source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister-js

## Self-host source
- App source: https://github.com/taimoorq/logister
